subject: [PATCH pynfs 10/13] nfs4.1: fix COPY_NOTIFY args union arm name in XDR

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a naming mismatch in the NFSv4.1 XDR (External Data Representation) code, specifically for the COPY_NOTIFY operation. The union arm was named opoffload_notify instead of opcopy_notify, which caused a TypeError when trying to construct the operation. The patch renames the arm to match the expected name, allowing the operation to be constructed correctly.
